passage.title: A Day with Articles (A, An, The)
passage.text: I need a book. I need an apple. The book is on the table. The sun rises in the east. I saw a dog. The dog is very cute. This is a good idea. That idea worked well. I need an umbrella. The Taj Mahal is in India.
passage.hindiTranslation: मुझे एक किताब चाहिए। मुझे एक सेब चाहिए। वह किताब मेज पर है। सूरज पूरब से निकलता है। मैंने एक कुत्ता देखा। वह कुत्ता बहुत प्यारा है। यह एक अच्छी idea है। वह idea बहुत काम आई। मुझे एक umbrella चाहिए। ताजमहल भारत में है।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I need a book...."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I need a book."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I need an apple...."?
options: The book is on the table.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I need an apple."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "The book is on..."?
options: The Taj Mahal is in India.
The sun rises in the east.
The book is on the table.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: The book is on the table.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "The book is on the table."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "The sun rises in..."?
options: The sun rises in the east.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: The sun rises in the east.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "The sun rises in the east."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I saw a dog...."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I saw a dog."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "The dog is very..."?
options: That opportunity will not come again.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "The dog is very cute."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "This is a good..."?
options: The Ganges river is very sacred.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "This is a good idea."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "That idea worked well...."?
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "That idea worked well."
